name: Echo Crystal
effects: When played: If cascade >=3, permanently +1 max_mana.

name: Clara's Divine Embrace
effects: BuffPowerToughness(power=1, toughness=1, duration=EOT, target=All your creatures)

name: Nyxella's Shadow Bind
effects: Sac a creature: DestroyAll(target=All opponent creatures)

name: Miri
effects: Unique: Whenever you sacrifice a creature (Shadow synergy), deal damage equal to its power to any target (Fire burn). Your Fire cards gain 'Drain: Gain life equal to damage dealt' if current cascade is Shadow.

name: Chesy
effects: Unique: Your Nature ramp effects (e.g., tokens, mana add) draw 1 card (Arcane advantage). Arcane draw effects create a 1/1 Plant token if current cascade is Nature.

name: Clara
effects: Unique: Holy lifegain effects also apply Bleed 1 to opponent (Shadow sabotage). Shadow drain/mill effects heal you for half the amount (rounded up) if current cascade is Holy.

name: Lyra
effects: Unique: Arcane control/draw effects prevent 1 damage to you or gain 1 life (Holy sustain). Holy heal/removal effects let you scry 1 or add 1 cascade if current cascade is Arcane.

name: Nyxella
effects: Unique: Fire damage effects create a 1/1 Beast token (Nature swarm). Nature creature/token summons deal 1 damage to opponent if current cascade is Fire.

name: Nyxella B
effects: Unique: Fire damage effects also gain life equal to half the damage dealt (Holy embrace). Holy card plays create a 1/1 Sparkly Demon token with Haste if current cascade is Fire.
flavor_text: Wings and flames tangle after our first night.
notes: Primary Element: Fire, Secondary Element: Holy, Unique Ability: Fire damage heals half, Holy creates hasty Sparkly Demon tokens on Fire cascade

name: Miri B
effects: Unique: Arcane draw or control effects ForceDiscard 1 from opponent (yandere insight). Shadow cards gain Drain (gain life equal to damage dealt) if current cascade is Arcane.
flavor_text: Still marked by you in the shadows.
notes: Primary Element: Arcane, Secondary Element: Shadow, Unique Ability: Arcane draw discards opponent, Shadow gains drain on Arcane cascade

name: Clara B
effects: Unique: Holy lifegain effects also DealDamage 3 to opponent (fiery zeal). Fire damage effects GainLife equal to half the damage and apply Bleed 1 if current cascade is Holy.
flavor_text: Purity burns away in your fire.
notes: Primary Element: Fire, Secondary Element: Holy, Unique Ability: Holy lifegain burns opponent, Fire damage heals and bleeds on Holy cascade

name: Lyra B
effects: Unique: Fire damage effects DrawCards 1 (explosive revelation). Arcane control or draw effects DealDamage 2 to random opponent creature if current cascade is Fire.
flavor_text: Donâ€™t you dare stop now.
notes: Primary Element: Fire, Secondary Element: Arcane, Unique Ability: Fire damage draws, Arcane control pings on Fire cascade

name: Chesy B
effects: Unique: Holy lifegain effects create a 1/1 Beast token (blessed kin). Nature ramp or token summons GainLife 2 and grant Endure to all your creatures if current cascade is Holy.
flavor_text: Holy heat claims his mate.
notes: Primary Element: Holy, Secondary Element: Nature, Unique Ability: Holy lifegain spawns Beasts, Nature ramp gains life + Endure on Holy cascade
